title: Local inference optimization is becoming a deployment constraint
summary: Local-first AI workflows increasingly depend on inference cost, quantization quality, and repeatable deployment on developer-owned hardware.
evidence: Seed item used to test Hermes source-grounded brief generation before live GitHub, arXiv, or RSS connectors are implemented.

title: Notion publishing needs structured database output
summary: A useful intelligence workspace requires structured fields such as score, confidence, action, and relations rather than a single pasted page.
evidence: Derived from HIP v1 product direction: Notion is the presentation workspace, Hermes performs automated processing.
